title: YTP: Link Becomes the Lisan al Gaib
description:
In this video, Link becomes the MWOAH'dib and turns Arrakis into the land of Volcanicity.

Dune 2 is freakin phenomenal and you need to see it on the biggest screen with the boomiest sound. This is not a drill.

If you loved this, subscribe for more and if you want to support me on Patreon, do so here:
